---
title: "ASIF × ESR × City Emissions × Border × Policy: Full Data Pipeline"
format: html
---
# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 0) Environment setup + user-editable constants
# INPUTS : (none)
# OUTPUTS: CONFIG (dict), PATHS (dict), county_coords (DataFrame, optional)
# ============================================================
```{python}
import os
import re
import warnings
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", category=FutureWarning)
pd.set_option("display.max_columns", 200)
pd.set_option("display.width", 200)

# -----------------------------
# User-editable paths (EDIT ME)
# -----------------------------
DATA_DIR = Path(r"/Users/xieziming/Xie-Le-DAP2-Final-Project/data")  # <-- change to your folder

PATHS = {
    # Raw inputs
    "asif_dta": DATA_DIR / "raw-data" / "ASIF9810_adj.dta",
    "esr_dta": DATA_DIR / "raw-data" / "ESR_panel_cleaned.dta",
    "city_xlsx": DATA_DIR / "raw-data" / "地级市工业三废数据 2003-2023年.xlsx",
    "border_dta": DATA_DIR / "raw-data" / "Province_border_clean.dta",
    "policy_xlsx": DATA_DIR / "raw-data" / "policy.xlsx",

    # County coordinates (CSV you found)
    # Put the file here: DATA_DIR/GeoJSON_data/全国县级以上地名代码及经纬度.csv
    "county_coord_csv": DATA_DIR / "raw-data" / "全国县级以上地名代码及经纬度.csv",

    # Outputs
    "out_dir": DATA_DIR / "derived-data",
    "final_parquet": DATA_DIR / "derived-data" / "final_big.parquet",
}

# --------------------------------------
# User-editable analysis/data parameters
# --------------------------------------
CONFIG = {
    # Firm-year range filter (optional)
    "firm_year_min": None,
    "firm_year_max": None,

    # City emissions year range (required by assignment)
    "city_year_min": 2003,
    "city_year_max": 2010,

    # Pollutant priority for "other_pollutant" at firm level
    "other_pollutant_priority": ["nox_emission", "cod_emission"],

    # City emission variable priority (from city excel) - pick first available
    "city_emission_priority": [
        "industrial_so2_emission_ton",
        "industrial_dust_emission_ton",
        "industrial_wastewater_emission_10kton",
    ],

    # How to build city_code from county_code
    "city_code_mode": "auto",  # options: "auto", "prefix4_00", "prov_0000"

    # Size quartile computation
    "size_quartile_mode": "within_year",  # options: "within_year", "overall"

    # Save intermediate outputs
    "save_city_wide": True,
}

# Ensure output directory exists
PATHS["out_dir"].mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Quick path diagnostics
print("cwd:", os.getcwd())
for k, p in PATHS.items():
    if isinstance(p, Path) and (p.suffix in [".dta", ".xlsx", ".csv", ".shp", ".geojson", ".parquet"]):
        print(f"{k}: {p} | exists={p.exists()}")

# OPTIONAL: show key constants as a small table (run-time display)
config_table = pd.DataFrame([{"key": k, "value": str(v)} for k, v in CONFIG.items()])
print("\nCONFIG preview:\n", config_table.head(20))


# ============================================================
# NEW: Robust CSV loader for Chinese encodings (GBK/GB18030/UTF-8)
# ============================================================
def read_csv_robust(path: Path, encodings=("utf-8-sig", "utf-8", "gb18030", "gbk", "cp936")):
    """
    依次尝试常见编码读取 csv，直到成功。
    - utf-8-sig: 常见带 BOM 的 utf8
    - gb18030/gbk/cp936: 中文 Windows 常见编码
    """
    last_err = None
    for enc in encodings:
        try:
            df = pd.read_csv(path, encoding=enc)
            print(f"[INFO] Read CSV with encoding='{enc}'")
            return df
        except UnicodeDecodeError as e:
            last_err = e
            continue
    raise UnicodeDecodeError(
        f"Failed to decode CSV with encodings={encodings}. Last error: {repr(last_err)}"
    )
def read_csv_robust(path: Path, encodings=("utf-8-sig", "utf-8", "gb18030", "gbk", "cp936")):
    last_err = None
    for enc in encodings:
        try:
            df = pd.read_csv(path, encoding=enc)
            print(f"[INFO] Read CSV with encoding='{enc}'")
            return df
        except UnicodeDecodeError as e:
            last_err = e
    raise UnicodeDecodeError(
        f"Failed to decode CSV with encodings={encodings}. Last error: {repr(last_err)}"
    )

# ============================================================
# NEW: Load county coordinates and rename Chinese headers -> English
# INPUT : PATHS["county_coord_csv"]
# OUTPUT: county_coords (county_code, county_name, county_lon, county_lat)
# ============================================================
if PATHS["county_coord_csv"].exists():
    county_coords_raw = read_csv_robust(PATHS["county_coord_csv"])

    # 统一中文表头为英文（满足你的要求：中文表头统一改英文）
    county_coords = county_coords_raw.rename(columns={
        "行政代码": "county_code",
        "地名": "county_name",
        "东经": "county_lon",
        "北纬": "county_lat",
    }).copy()

    # 类型清洗（后面 merge 更稳）
    county_coords["county_code"] = county_coords["county_code"].astype(str).str.strip()
    county_coords["county_lon"] = pd.to_numeric(county_coords["county_lon"], errors="coerce")
    county_coords["county_lat"] = pd.to_numeric(county_coords["county_lat"], errors="coerce")

    # 企业 dq 是 6 位；统一补齐到 6 位
    county_coords["county_code"] = (
        county_coords["county_code"]
        .str.replace(r"\.0$", "", regex=True)
        .str.zfill(6)
    )

    # 只保留必要列，去重
    county_coords = county_coords.dropna(subset=["county_code", "county_lon", "county_lat"]).copy()
    county_coords = county_coords[["county_code", "county_name", "county_lon", "county_lat"]].drop_duplicates()

    print("\nLoaded county_coords:", county_coords.shape)
else:
    county_coords = None
    print("\n[INFO] county_coord_csv not found yet. county_coords is set to None.")
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 1) Helper functions (validation, cleaning, dedup, diagnostics)
# INPUTS : (none)
# OUTPUTS: helper functions in memory
# ============================================================
```{python}
def require_exists(path: Path, label: str):
    if not path.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"[{label}] file not found: {path}")

def require_columns(df: pd.DataFrame, cols, df_name="df"):
    missing = [c for c in cols if c not in df.columns]
    if missing:
        raise KeyError(f"[{df_name}] missing columns: {missing}\nAvailable columns sample: {list(df.columns)[:50]}")

def clean_id(x):
    """
    Convert id to clean string:
    - strip spaces
    - remove trailing '.0' (common when numeric read as float)
    """
    if pd.isna(x):
        return np.nan
    s = str(x).strip()
    s = re.sub(r"\.0$", "", s)
    s = s.replace(" ", "").replace("\u3000", "")
    return s

def clean_admin_code(x, width=6):
    """
    Clean administrative code to fixed-width string (default 6 digits).
    """
    if pd.isna(x):
        return np.nan
    s = str(x).strip()
    s = re.sub(r"\.0$", "", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\D", "", s)  # keep digits only
    if s == "":
        return np.nan
    return s.zfill(width)

def clean_name_exact(x):
    """
    Minimal normalization for exact match (still exact after normalization):
    - remove spaces (normal + full-width)
    - unify Chinese parentheses to ASCII
    """
    if pd.isna(x):
        return np.nan
    s = str(x).strip()
    s = s.replace(" ", "").replace("\u3000", "")
    s = s.replace("（", "(").replace("）", ")")
    return s

def coerce_numeric(df: pd.DataFrame, cols, nonnegative_cols=None, df_name="df"):
    """
    Convert columns to numeric; set impossible negatives to NaN for specified nonnegative_cols.
    """
    if nonnegative_cols is None:
        nonnegative_cols = []
    for c in cols:
        if c not in df.columns:
            continue
        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors="coerce")
        if c in nonnegative_cols:
            df.loc[df[c] < 0, c] = np.nan
    return df

def report_key_health(df: pd.DataFrame, key_cols, df_name="df"):
    """
    Print empty key counts and duplicate counts for key columns.
    """
    print(f"\n[{df_name}] shape={df.shape}")
    for k in key_cols:
        if k not in df.columns:
            print(f"  - key col missing: {k}")
            continue
        empty = df[k].isna().sum() + (df[k].astype(str).str.strip() == "").sum()
        print(f"  - empty {k}: {empty:,}")
    dups = df.duplicated(subset=key_cols).sum()
    print(f"  - duplicated rows on key {key_cols}: {dups:,} (dup_rate={dups/len(df):.6f})")

def dedup_by_missingness(df: pd.DataFrame, key_cols, quality_cols, df_name="df"):
    """
    Deduplicate by keeping the row with the fewest missing values among quality_cols within each key group.
    """
    df = df.copy()
    for c in quality_cols:
        if c not in df.columns:
            df[c] = np.nan

    df["_na_cnt"] = df[quality_cols].isna().sum(axis=1)
    df = df.sort_values(key_cols + ["_na_cnt"])
    before = len(df)
    df = df.drop_duplicates(subset=key_cols, keep="first").drop(columns=["_na_cnt"])
    after = len(df)
    print(f"[{df_name}] dedup: dropped {before-after:,} duplicated key rows (kept best by missingness).")
    return df

def pick_first_available(df: pd.DataFrame, candidates):
    """
    Return the first column in candidates that exists in df; else None.
    """
    for c in candidates:
        if c in df.columns:
            return c
    return None

def build_city_code_from_county(county_code: pd.Series, city_code_mode="auto"):
    """
    Build a 6-digit city code from a 6-digit county code.
    - For most prefecture-level cities: city_code = county[:4] + "00"
    - For municipalities (Beijing/Tianjin/Shanghai/Chongqing): city_code = prov + "0000"
    """
    cc = county_code.astype(str).str.zfill(6)

    prov = cc.str[:2]
    city_prefix4 = cc.str[:4] + "00"
    prov_0000 = prov + "0000"

    municipalities = {"11", "12", "31", "50"}

    if city_code_mode == "prefix4_00":
        return city_prefix4
    if city_code_mode == "prov_0000":
        return prov_0000
    # auto
    out = city_prefix4.copy()
    out.loc[prov.isin(municipalities)] = prov_0000.loc[prov.isin(municipalities)]
    return out
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 2) Define raw columns to load + standardize to English column names
# INPUTS : CONFIG, PATHS
# OUTPUTS: ASIF_COLS, ESR_COLS, RENAME dicts
# ============================================================

```{python}
# NOTE: We load only needed columns for memory efficiency (fallback to full read if needed).

ASIF_COLS = [
    "id", "year", "dq", "name",
    "cic2", "indName", "type",
    "employment", "output", "profit",
]

ESR_COLS = [
    "id_ESR", "year", "dq_ESR", "name_ESR",
    "so2_emission", "nox_emission", "cod_emission",
    "output_ESR",
]

# Standardized English names (firm data already mostly English; we standardize to unified schema)
ASIF_RENAME = {
    "id": "id_asif",
    "dq": "dq_asif",
    "name": "firm_name_asif",
    "indName": "industry_name_asif",
}

ESR_RENAME = {
    "id_ESR": "id_esr",
    "dq_ESR": "dq_esr",
    "name_ESR": "firm_name_esr",
}

# City excel rename (Chinese headers -> English)
CITY_RENAME = {
    "年份": "year",
    "省份": "province",
    "城市": "city",
    "城市代码": "city_code",
    "所属地域": "macro_region",
    "工业废水排放量\n(万吨)": "industrial_wastewater_emission_10kton",
    "工业二氧化硫排放量\n（吨）": "industrial_so2_emission_ton",
    "工业烟尘排放量\n（吨）": "industrial_dust_emission_ton",
}

# Border dta rename candidates (Chinese headers -> English)
# We will apply fuzzy matching in case the exact Chinese strings differ.
BORDER_RENAME_CANDIDATES = {
    "county_code": ["县级代码", "县级代碼", "县代码", "县级代码 "],
    "county_name": ["县级名称", "县级名稱", "县名称", "县级名称 "],
}

# Policy sheet rename (Chinese headers -> English)
POLICY_RENAME = {
    "序号": "idx",
    "省份": "province",
    "2005年二氧化硫排放量(万吨)": "so2_2005_10kton",
    "2010年二氧化硫排放量(万吨)": "so2_2010_actual_10kton",
    "“十一五”期间二氧化硫减排比例": "so2_reduction_rate_11th_fyp",
    "2010年二氧化硫计划排放量(万吨)": "so2_2010_planned_10kton",
    "“十一五”期间二氧化硫减排任务": "so2_reduction_target_11th_fyp",
    "二氧化硫控制区": "so2_control_zone",
    "备注": "notes",
}
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 3) Read ASIF & ESR (stata), keep needed columns, rename to English
# INPUTS : PATHS['asif_dta'], PATHS['esr_dta'], ASIF_COLS, ESR_COLS
# OUTPUTS: ASIF_raw, ESR_raw
# ============================================================
```{python}
require_exists(PATHS["asif_dta"], "ASIF")
require_exists(PATHS["esr_dta"], "ESR")

# Try reading only required columns; if fails, read full and subset.
try:
    ASIF_raw = pd.read_stata(PATHS["asif_dta"], convert_categoricals=False, columns=ASIF_COLS)
except Exception as e:
    print("[WARN] ASIF read with columns failed; fallback to full read. Error:", repr(e))
    ASIF_full = pd.read_stata(PATHS["asif_dta"], convert_categoricals=False)
    require_columns(ASIF_full, ASIF_COLS, "ASIF_full")
    ASIF_raw = ASIF_full[ASIF_COLS].copy()

try:
    ESR_raw = pd.read_stata(PATHS["esr_dta"], convert_categoricals=False, columns=ESR_COLS)
except Exception as e:
    print("[WARN] ESR read with columns failed; fallback to full read. Error:", repr(e))
    ESR_full = pd.read_stata(PATHS["esr_dta"], convert_categoricals=False)
    require_columns(ESR_full, ESR_COLS, "ESR_full")
    ESR_raw = ESR_full[ESR_COLS].copy()

ASIF_raw = ASIF_raw.rename(columns=ASIF_RENAME)
ESR_raw = ESR_raw.rename(columns=ESR_RENAME)

print("ASIF_raw shape:", ASIF_raw.shape)
print("ESR_raw  shape:", ESR_raw.shape)
print("ASIF_raw cols:", list(ASIF_raw.columns))
print("ESR_raw  cols:", list(ESR_raw.columns))
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 4) Read policy.xlsx (first sheet), detect header row, rename to English, create prov_code
# INPUTS : PATHS['policy_xlsx'], POLICY_RENAME
# OUTPUTS: policy_df (English columns), prov_code mapping columns: prov_code, province
# ============================================================
```{python}
require_exists(PATHS["policy_xlsx"], "policy.xlsx")

# Load first sheet with header=None so we can locate true header row
policy_xls = pd.ExcelFile(PATHS["policy_xlsx"])
policy_sheet0 = policy_xls.sheet_names[0]

policy_tmp = pd.read_excel(PATHS["policy_xlsx"], sheet_name=policy_sheet0, header=None)

# find first row with enough non-NA cells (robust to leading blank row)
non_na_counts = policy_tmp.notna().sum(axis=1)
header_row_idx = int(non_na_counts.idxmax())  # typically 1 in your file

policy_header = policy_tmp.iloc[header_row_idx].tolist()
policy_body = policy_tmp.iloc[header_row_idx + 1:].copy()
policy_body.columns = policy_header

# Drop fully empty columns (often first blank column)
policy_body = policy_body.dropna(axis=1, how="all")
policy_df = policy_body.copy()

# Rename columns to English
policy_df = policy_df.rename(columns=POLICY_RENAME)

# Normalize province name to improve mapping robustness
def normalize_province_cn(x):
    if pd.isna(x):
        return np.nan
    s = str(x).strip()
    s = s.replace(" ", "").replace("\u3000", "")
    # remove common suffixes
    s = re.sub(r"(省|市|自治区|壮族自治区|回族自治区|维吾尔自治区|特别行政区)$", "", s)
    return s

if "province" in policy_df.columns:
    policy_df["province"] = policy_df["province"].map(normalize_province_cn)

# Provincial code mapping (two-digit, consistent with admin codes' first 2 digits)
# NOTE: Commonly used mapping aligned with PRC administrative division codes (GB/T 2260 style).
PROV_CN2CODE = {
    "北京": "11", "天津": "12", "河北": "13", "山西": "14", "内蒙古": "15",
    "辽宁": "21", "吉林": "22", "黑龙江": "23",
    "上海": "31", "江苏": "32", "浙江": "33", "安徽": "34", "福建": "35", "江西": "36", "山东": "37",
    "河南": "41", "湖北": "42", "湖南": "43", "广东": "44", "广西": "45", "海南": "46",
    "重庆": "50", "四川": "51", "贵州": "52", "云南": "53", "西藏": "54",
    "陕西": "61", "甘肃": "62", "青海": "63", "宁夏": "64", "新疆": "65",
    "香港": "81", "澳门": "82",
    "台湾": "71",
}

policy_df["prov_code"] = policy_df["province"].map(PROV_CN2CODE)

# Convert policy numeric variables
policy_num_cols = [
    "so2_2005_10kton", "so2_2010_actual_10kton", "so2_2010_planned_10kton",
    "so2_reduction_rate_11th_fyp", "so2_reduction_target_11th_fyp",
]
policy_df = coerce_numeric(
    policy_df,
    cols=policy_num_cols,
    nonnegative_cols=["so2_2005_10kton", "so2_2010_actual_10kton", "so2_2010_planned_10kton"],
    df_name="policy_df",
)

policy_df = policy_df[policy_df["prov_code"].notna()].copy()

print("policy_df sheet used:", policy_sheet0)
print("policy_df shape:", policy_df.shape)
print("policy_df columns:", list(policy_df.columns))

# Keep a clean policy subset for merging
policy_keep = ["prov_code", "province"] + [c for c in policy_num_cols if c in policy_df.columns]
policy_keep += [c for c in ["so2_control_zone", "notes"] if c in policy_df.columns]
policy_df = policy_df[policy_keep].copy()

# Diagnostics: unmapped provinces
unmapped = policy_df[policy_df["prov_code"].isna()]["province"].unique().tolist()
if len(unmapped) > 0:
    print("[WARN] policy provinces not mapped to prov_code:", unmapped)
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 5) Read city_xlsx (sheet contains '线性插值'), rename Chinese headers to English,
#          filter 2003-2010, create city_long and (optional) city_wide
# INPUTS : PATHS['city_xlsx'], CITY_RENAME, CONFIG
# OUTPUTS: city_long (year, city_code, city_year_emission), city_wide (optional)
# ============================================================
```{python}
require_exists(PATHS["city_xlsx"], "city_xlsx")

city_xls = pd.ExcelFile(PATHS["city_xlsx"])
# auto select sheet containing '线性插值'
city_sheet_candidates = [s for s in city_xls.sheet_names if "线性插值" in str(s)]
if len(city_sheet_candidates) == 0:
    raise ValueError(f"Cannot find sheet containing '线性插值'. Available sheets: {city_xls.sheet_names}")
city_sheet = city_sheet_candidates[0]

city_df_raw = pd.read_excel(PATHS["city_xlsx"], sheet_name=city_sheet)
city_df = city_df_raw.rename(columns=CITY_RENAME).copy()

# Ensure all Chinese headers are converted (basic check)
cn_cols = [c for c in city_df.columns if re.search(r"[\u4e00-\u9fff]", str(c))]
if len(cn_cols) > 0:
    print("[WARN] City df still has Chinese column names (please extend CITY_RENAME):", cn_cols)

require_columns(city_df, ["year", "city_code"], "city_df")

# Clean year and city_code
city_df["year"] = pd.to_numeric(city_df["year"], errors="coerce").astype("Int64")
city_df["city_code"] = city_df["city_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))

# Filter year range for city
y0, y1 = CONFIG["city_year_min"], CONFIG["city_year_max"]
city_df = city_df[city_df["year"].between(y0, y1)].copy()

# Coerce emission columns to numeric
for c in ["industrial_wastewater_emission_10kton", "industrial_so2_emission_ton", "industrial_dust_emission_ton"]:
    if c in city_df.columns:
        city_df[c] = pd.to_numeric(city_df[c], errors="coerce")
        city_df.loc[city_df[c] < 0, c] = np.nan

# Choose city emission variable by priority
city_emission_col = pick_first_available(city_df, CONFIG["city_emission_priority"])
if city_emission_col is None:
    raise KeyError(
        f"Cannot find any city emission variable from priority list: {CONFIG['city_emission_priority']}\n"
        f"Available columns: {list(city_df.columns)}"
    )

city_long = city_df[["year", "city_code", city_emission_col]].copy()
city_long = city_long.rename(columns={city_emission_col: "city_year_emission"})
city_long = city_long.dropna(subset=["year", "city_code"]).copy()

# If duplicates exist (same city_code-year), aggregate mean (or sum based on your definition)
dup_city = city_long.duplicated(subset=["year", "city_code"]).sum()
if dup_city > 0:
    print(f"[WARN] city_long has {dup_city:,} duplicate city-year rows; aggregating by mean.")
    city_long = city_long.groupby(["year", "city_code"], as_index=False)["city_year_emission"].mean()

print("city_sheet used:", city_sheet)
print("city_long shape:", city_long.shape)
print("city emission variable used:", city_emission_col)
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 6) Read Province_border_clean.dta, rename Chinese headers to English,
#          build is_border_county flag list
# INPUTS : PATHS['border_dta'], BORDER_RENAME_CANDIDATES
# OUTPUTS: border_list (county_code, is_border_county)
# ============================================================
```{python}
require_exists(PATHS["border_dta"], "Province_border_clean.dta")

border_raw = pd.read_stata(PATHS["border_dta"], convert_categoricals=False)

# Attempt to rename Chinese columns to English using candidate list
def rename_by_candidates(df, candidates_map):
    df = df.copy()
    col_rename = {}
    for eng, cn_list in candidates_map.items():
        for cn in cn_list:
            if cn in df.columns:
                col_rename[cn] = eng
                break
    return df.rename(columns=col_rename)

border_df = rename_by_candidates(border_raw, BORDER_RENAME_CANDIDATES)

# If still not found, try fuzzy find by contains
if "county_code" not in border_df.columns:
    for c in border_df.columns:
        if "县" in str(c) and "码" in str(c):
            border_df = border_df.rename(columns={c: "county_code"})
            break
if "county_name" not in border_df.columns:
    for c in border_df.columns:
        if "县" in str(c) and "名" in str(c):
            border_df = border_df.rename(columns={c: "county_name"})
            break

if "county_code" not in border_df.columns:
    raise KeyError(f"Cannot find county code column in border_df. Columns: {list(border_df.columns)}")

border_df["county_code"] = border_df["county_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))
border_df = border_df.dropna(subset=["county_code"]).copy()

border_list = border_df[["county_code"]].drop_duplicates().copy()
border_list["is_border_county"] = True

print("border_df shape:", border_df.shape)
print("border_list unique counties:", border_list["county_code"].nunique())
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 7) Prepare ASIF & ESR: clean keys, add name_clean, admin codes, numeric conversion, dedup ASIF
# INPUTS : ASIF_raw, ESR_raw, CONFIG
# OUTPUTS: ASIF_clean_dedup, ESR_clean
# ============================================================
```{python}
ASIF = ASIF_raw.copy()
ESR = ESR_raw.copy()

# Standardize key fields
ASIF["year"] = pd.to_numeric(ASIF["year"], errors="coerce").astype("Int64")
ESR["year"] = pd.to_numeric(ESR["year"], errors="coerce").astype("Int64")

ASIF["firm_id"] = ASIF["id_asif"].map(clean_id)
ESR["firm_id"] = ESR["id_esr"].map(clean_id)

# Clean admin codes: county_code, prov_code
ASIF["county_code"] = ASIF["dq_asif"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))
ESR["county_code_esr"] = ESR["dq_esr"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))

ASIF["prov_code"] = ASIF["county_code"].astype(str).str[:2]
ESR["prov_code"] = ESR["county_code_esr"].astype(str).str[:2]

# City code from county (for later merge with city emissions)
ASIF["city_code"] = build_city_code_from_county(ASIF["county_code"], city_code_mode=CONFIG["city_code_mode"])
ESR["city_code"] = build_city_code_from_county(ESR["county_code_esr"], city_code_mode=CONFIG["city_code_mode"])

# Clean names for exact matching
ASIF["name_clean"] = ASIF["firm_name_asif"].map(clean_name_exact)
ESR["name_clean"] = ESR["firm_name_esr"].map(clean_name_exact)

# Optional year filtering for firm-year tables
if CONFIG["firm_year_min"] is not None:
    ASIF = ASIF[ASIF["year"] >= CONFIG["firm_year_min"]].copy()
    ESR = ESR[ESR["year"] >= CONFIG["firm_year_min"]].copy()
if CONFIG["firm_year_max"] is not None:
    ASIF = ASIF[ASIF["year"] <= CONFIG["firm_year_max"]].copy()
    ESR = ESR[ESR["year"] <= CONFIG["firm_year_max"]].copy()

# Remove empty key rows
def drop_empty_keys(df, key_cols, df_name="df"):
    df = df.copy()
    mask = np.zeros(len(df), dtype=bool)
    for k in key_cols:
        s = df[k].astype(str).str.strip()
        mask = mask | df[k].isna() | (s == "") | (s.str.lower() == "nan")
    dropped = int(mask.sum())
    out = df.loc[~mask].copy()
    print(f"[{df_name}] dropped empty key rows: {dropped:,}")
    return out

ASIF = drop_empty_keys(ASIF, ["firm_id", "year"], "ASIF")
ESR = drop_empty_keys(ESR, ["firm_id", "year"], "ESR")

# Convert numeric variables and basic plausibility cleaning
ASIF = coerce_numeric(
    ASIF,
    cols=["employment", "output", "profit"],
    nonnegative_cols=["employment", "output"],
    df_name="ASIF",
)
ESR = coerce_numeric(
    ESR,
    cols=["so2_emission", "nox_emission", "cod_emission", "output_ESR"],
    nonnegative_cols=["so2_emission", "nox_emission", "cod_emission", "output_ESR"],
    df_name="ESR",
)

# Diagnostics before dedup
report_key_health(ASIF, ["firm_id", "year"], "ASIF (pre-dedup)")
report_key_health(ESR, ["firm_id", "year"], "ESR")

# Deduplicate ASIF by missingness quality rule
ASIF_quality_cols = ["county_code", "cic2", "type", "employment", "output", "profit", "name_clean"]
ASIF_clean_dedup = dedup_by_missingness(
    ASIF,
    key_cols=["firm_id", "year"],
    quality_cols=ASIF_quality_cols,
    df_name="ASIF_clean_dedup",
)

# ESR: if duplicates exist, keep first by missingness too (should be 0 in your diagnostic earlier)
if ESR.duplicated(subset=["firm_id", "year"]).sum() > 0:
    ESR = dedup_by_missingness(
        ESR,
        key_cols=["firm_id", "year"],
        quality_cols=["county_code_esr", "so2_emission", "nox_emission", "cod_emission", "name_clean"],
        df_name="ESR_dedup",
    )
ESR_clean = ESR.copy()

report_key_health(ASIF_clean_dedup, ["firm_id", "year"], "ASIF_clean_dedup (post)")
report_key_health(ESR_clean, ["firm_id", "year"], "ESR_clean (post)")
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 8) Merge ASIF × ESR by (firm_id, year) first; create merged_left_id and merged_inner_id
# INPUTS : ASIF_clean_dedup, ESR_clean
# OUTPUTS: merged_left_id (with _merge), merged_inner_id
# ============================================================
```{python}
# Keep only necessary columns for merging
ASIF_keep_cols = [
    "firm_id", "year",
    "county_code", "prov_code", "city_code",
    "cic2", "type", "employment", "output", "profit",
    "firm_name_asif", "name_clean",
]
ESR_keep_cols = [
    "firm_id", "year",
    "county_code_esr", "prov_code", "city_code",
    "so2_emission", "nox_emission", "cod_emission",
    "firm_name_esr", "name_clean",
]

ASIF_m = ASIF_clean_dedup[[c for c in ASIF_keep_cols if c in ASIF_clean_dedup.columns]].copy()
ESR_m = ESR_clean[[c for c in ESR_keep_cols if c in ESR_clean.columns]].copy()

# Left merge by id
merged_left_id = ASIF_m.merge(
    ESR_m,
    on=["firm_id", "year"],
    how="left",
    indicator=True,
    suffixes=("_asif", "_esr"),
)

merged_left_id["match_method"] = np.where(merged_left_id["_merge"] == "both", "id", "none")

# Inner by id
merged_inner_id = ASIF_m.merge(
    ESR_m,
    on=["firm_id", "year"],
    how="inner",
    suffixes=("_asif", "_esr"),
)

print("\n[MERGE by id] merged_left_id shape:", merged_left_id.shape)
print("[MERGE by id] merged_inner_id shape:", merged_inner_id.shape)
print("[MERGE by id] match rate vs ASIF:", round((merged_left_id["_merge"] == "both").mean(), 4))
print("[MERGE by id] match rate vs ESR :", round(len(merged_inner_id) / len(ESR_m), 4))
print(merged_left_id["_merge"].value_counts())
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 9) For rows not matched by id, do exact name match on (year, name_clean) ONLY IF UNIQUE on both sides
# INPUTS : merged_left_id, ESR_clean
# OUTPUTS: merged_left (final left with fill), merged_inner (final inner after fill)
# ============================================================

```{python}
# -----------------------------
# Identify unmatched by id
# -----------------------------
unmatched = merged_left_id[merged_left_id["_merge"] == "left_only"].copy()

# 使用 ASIF 的清洗后名称列（注意：这里用 name_clean_asif）
unmatched = unmatched.dropna(subset=["name_clean_asif"]).copy()

# -----------------------------
# Build ESR table for name matching
# -----------------------------
# 使用 ESR 的清洗后名称列（注意：这里用 name_clean_esr）
esr_name = ESR_clean[[
    "year", "name_clean",
    "county_code_esr", "so2_emission", "nox_emission", "cod_emission"
]].copy()

# 如果你 ESR_clean 里 name_clean 的列名就是 "name_clean"，那下面这行不用改；
# 如果你 ESR_clean 里叫 "name_clean" 没问题，但 merged_left_id 里叫 name_clean_esr，是两回事。
esr_name = esr_name.dropna(subset=["name_clean"]).copy()

# 为了和 unmatched 的列名一致，这里把 ESR 的 name_clean 重命名成 name_clean_esr（可选但更清晰）
esr_name = esr_name.rename(columns={"name_clean": "name_clean_esr"})

# -----------------------------
# Keep only unique (year, name_clean) on ESR side
# -----------------------------
esr_counts = esr_name.groupby(["year", "name_clean_esr"]).size().reset_index(name="n")
esr_unique = esr_name.merge(esr_counts, on=["year", "name_clean_esr"], how="left")
esr_unique = esr_unique[esr_unique["n"] == 1].drop(columns=["n"]).copy()

# -----------------------------
# Keep only unique (year, name_clean) among ASIF-unmatched side
# -----------------------------
asif_counts = unmatched.groupby(["year", "name_clean_asif"]).size().reset_index(name="n")
unmatched_unique = unmatched.merge(asif_counts, on=["year", "name_clean_asif"], how="left")
unmatched_unique = unmatched_unique[unmatched_unique["n"] == 1].drop(columns=["n"]).copy()

# -----------------------------
# Name exact match on (year, name_clean)
# -----------------------------
fill_by_name = unmatched_unique.merge(
    esr_unique,
    left_on=["year", "name_clean_asif"],
    right_on=["year", "name_clean_esr"],
    how="left",
    indicator="name_merge",
)

fill_by_name = fill_by_name[fill_by_name["name_merge"] == "both"].copy()

print("\n[NAME exact match] candidates (unmatched rows):", len(unmatched))
print("[NAME exact match] unique candidates:", len(unmatched_unique))
print("[NAME exact match] successful fills:", len(fill_by_name))

# -----------------------------
# Build fill lookup keyed by (firm_id, year)
# IMPORTANT: use *_y columns (from ESR side) as the fill source
# -----------------------------
fill_lookup = (
    fill_by_name
    .set_index(["firm_id", "year"])[
        ["county_code_esr_y", "so2_emission_y", "nox_emission_y", "cod_emission_y"]
    ]
    .rename(columns={
        "county_code_esr_y": "county_code_esr",
        "so2_emission_y": "so2_emission",
        "nox_emission_y": "nox_emission",
        "cod_emission_y": "cod_emission",
    })
)

# -----------------------------
# Apply fill to merged_left_id (only where missing)
# -----------------------------
merged_left = merged_left_id.copy().set_index(["firm_id", "year"])

for col in ["county_code_esr", "so2_emission", "nox_emission", "cod_emission"]:
    if col in merged_left.columns:
        merged_left[col] = merged_left[col].fillna(fill_lookup[col])

merged_left = merged_left.reset_index()

# -----------------------------
# Update match labels
# -----------------------------
merged_left["match_method"] = np.where(
    merged_left["_merge"] == "both",
    "id",
    np.where(~merged_left["so2_emission"].isna(), "name", "none"),
)
merged_left["_merge_final"] = np.where(
    merged_left["match_method"].isin(["id", "name"]),
    "both",
    "left_only"
)

print("[FINAL merge] matched share (id or name):", round((merged_left["_merge_final"] == "both").mean(), 4))
print(merged_left["match_method"].value_counts(dropna=False))

merged_inner = merged_left[merged_left["_merge_final"] == "both"].copy()

print("merged_left shape:", merged_left.shape)
print("merged_inner shape:", merged_inner.shape)
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 10) Merge policy_df (province-level) into firm-year panel by prov_code
# INPUTS : merged_left, policy_df
# OUTPUTS: merged_left_pol, merged_inner_pol
# ============================================================
```{python}
# Create unified prov_code for merging policy (prefer ASIF, fallback to ESR)
if "prov_code" not in merged_left.columns:
    if "prov_code_asif" in merged_left.columns:
        merged_left["prov_code"] = merged_left["prov_code_asif"]
    if "prov_code" not in merged_left.columns and "prov_code_esr" in merged_left.columns:
        merged_left["prov_code"] = merged_left["prov_code_esr"]
    # if both exist, prefer ASIF but fill missing with ESR
    if "prov_code_asif" in merged_left.columns and "prov_code_esr" in merged_left.columns:
        merged_left["prov_code"] = merged_left["prov_code_asif"].fillna(merged_left["prov_code_esr"])

if "prov_code" not in merged_inner.columns:
    if "prov_code_asif" in merged_inner.columns:
        merged_inner["prov_code"] = merged_inner["prov_code_asif"]
    if "prov_code" not in merged_inner.columns and "prov_code_esr" in merged_inner.columns:
        merged_inner["prov_code"] = merged_inner["prov_code_esr"]
    if "prov_code_asif" in merged_inner.columns and "prov_code_esr" in merged_inner.columns:
        merged_inner["prov_code"] = merged_inner["prov_code_asif"].fillna(merged_inner["prov_code_esr"])
```

```{python}
# Policy columns are already English; merge by prov_code
policy_merge_cols = [c for c in policy_df.columns if c not in ["province"]] + ["province"]
policy_merge_cols = list(dict.fromkeys(policy_merge_cols))  # stable unique

merged_left_pol = merged_left.merge(
    policy_df[policy_merge_cols],
    on="prov_code",
    how="left",
    suffixes=("", "_policy"),
)

merged_inner_pol = merged_inner.merge(
    policy_df[policy_merge_cols],
    on="prov_code",
    how="left",
    suffixes=("", "_policy"),
)

print("\n[POLICY merge] merged_left_pol shape:", merged_left_pol.shape)
print("[POLICY merge] policy missing rate:", round(merged_left_pol["so2_reduction_rate_11th_fyp"].isna().mean(), 4)
      if "so2_reduction_rate_11th_fyp" in merged_left_pol.columns else "N/A")
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 11) Merge city emissions (city_long) into firm-year panel by (city_code, year)
# INPUTS : merged_left_pol, city_long
# OUTPUTS: merged_left_city, merged_inner_city
# ============================================================
```{python}
# Ensure we have a unified city_code column (prefer ASIF, fallback to ESR)
for df in [merged_left_pol, merged_inner_pol]:
    if "city_code" not in df.columns:
        if "city_code_asif" in df.columns and "city_code_esr" in df.columns:
            df["city_code"] = df["city_code_asif"].fillna(df["city_code_esr"])
        elif "city_code_asif" in df.columns:
            df["city_code"] = df["city_code_asif"]
        elif "city_code_esr" in df.columns:
            df["city_code"] = df["city_code_esr"]
        else:
            raise KeyError("Cannot find city_code / city_code_asif / city_code_esr in merged data.")

# Make year types consistent for merge
merged_left_pol["year"] = pd.to_numeric(merged_left_pol["year"], errors="coerce").astype("Int64")
merged_inner_pol["year"] = pd.to_numeric(merged_inner_pol["year"], errors="coerce").astype("Int64")

city_long["year"] = pd.to_numeric(city_long["year"], errors="coerce").astype("Int64")

# Ensure city_code is clean string
merged_left_pol["city_code"] = merged_left_pol["city_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))
merged_inner_pol["city_code"] = merged_inner_pol["city_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))

merged_left_city = merged_left_pol.merge(
    city_long,
    on=["city_code", "year"],
    how="left",
)

merged_inner_city = merged_inner_pol.merge(
    city_long,
    on=["city_code", "year"],
    how="left",
)

print("\n[CITY merge] merged_left_city shape:", merged_left_city.shape)
print("[CITY merge] city_year_emission missing rate:",
      round(merged_left_city["city_year_emission"].isna().mean(), 4))
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 12) Merge border county flag (is_border_county) into firm-year panel by county_code
# INPUTS : merged_left_city, border_list
# OUTPUTS: merged_left_border, merged_inner_border
# ============================================================
```{python}
merged_left_city["county_code"] = merged_left_city["county_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))
merged_inner_city["county_code"] = merged_inner_city["county_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))

merged_left_border = merged_left_city.merge(
    border_list,
    on="county_code",
    how="left",
)
merged_left_border["is_border_county"] = merged_left_border["is_border_county"].fillna(False)

merged_inner_border = merged_inner_city.merge(
    border_list,
    on="county_code",
    how="left",
)
merged_inner_border["is_border_county"] = merged_inner_border["is_border_county"].fillna(False)

print("\n[BORDER merge] merged_left_border shape:", merged_left_border.shape)
print("[BORDER merge] border share:", round(merged_left_border["is_border_county"].mean(), 4))
```



# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 13) Load county coordinates (CSV preferred) and merge into firm-year panels
# INPUTS :
#   PATHS, read_csv_robust, clean_admin_code, require_columns
#   merged_left_border, merged_inner_border
# OUTPUTS:
#   county_coords, merged_left_geo, merged_inner_geo
# ============================================================
```{python}
def load_county_coords(PATHS):
    """
    Priority:
      1) county_coord_csv exists -> read (county_code, county_name, county_lon, county_lat)
      2) county_geojson/shapefile exists -> compute centroid via geopandas
      3) otherwise -> raise clear error
    """
    # ----------------------------------------------------------
    # Option B: explicit centroid CSV (recommended)
    # ----------------------------------------------------------
    if PATHS["county_coord_csv"].exists():
        coords = read_csv_robust(PATHS["county_coord_csv"])

        # 统一中文表头为英文（满足你的要求：中文表头统一改英文）
        # 兼容你这份文件的表头：行政代码, 地名, 东经, 北纬
        rename_map = {
            # Your CSV (preferred)
            "行政代码": "county_code",
            "地名": "county_name",
            "东经": "county_lon",
            "北纬": "county_lat",

            # Other possible variants (fallback)
            "县级代码": "county_code",
            "县级名称": "county_name",
            "县代码": "county_code",
            "县名称": "county_name",
            "经度": "county_lon",
            "纬度": "county_lat",
            "lon": "county_lon",
            "lat": "county_lat",
            "LON": "county_lon",
            "LAT": "county_lat",
        }
        coords = coords.rename(columns=rename_map).copy()

        # 如果仍有中文列名残留，提醒你补充 rename_map（不强制报错）
        cn_cols = [c for c in coords.columns if re.search(r"[\u4e00-\u9fff]", str(c))]
        if len(cn_cols) > 0:
            print("[WARN] county_coord_csv still has Chinese column names (extend rename_map):", cn_cols)

        # 硬校验：必须有英文列名
        require_columns(coords, ["county_code", "county_lon", "county_lat"], "county_coord_csv")

        # 清洗：县代码统一为 6 位数字字符串
        coords["county_code"] = coords["county_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))

        # 数值化经纬度
        coords["county_lon"] = pd.to_numeric(coords["county_lon"], errors="coerce")
        coords["county_lat"] = pd.to_numeric(coords["county_lat"], errors="coerce")

        # 如存在 county_name，也保留（否则补一个空列，保证下游列稳定）
        if "county_name" not in coords.columns:
            coords["county_name"] = np.nan

        # 去掉缺失，去重
        coords = coords.dropna(subset=["county_code", "county_lon", "county_lat"]).copy()
        coords = coords[["county_code", "county_name", "county_lon", "county_lat"]].drop_duplicates()

        return coords

    # ----------------------------------------------------------
    # Option A: boundary file -> centroid (optional)
    # ----------------------------------------------------------
    geo_path = None
    if PATHS["county_geojson"].exists():
        geo_path = PATHS["county_geojson"]
    elif PATHS["county_shapefile"].exists():
        geo_path = PATHS["county_shapefile"]

    if geo_path is not None:
        try:
            import geopandas as gpd
        except Exception as e:
            raise ImportError(
                "geopandas is required to compute centroids from a boundary file. "
                "Install it or provide county_coord_csv instead. "
                f"Original error: {repr(e)}"
            )

        gdf = gpd.read_file(geo_path)

        # 中文/常见字段 -> 英文
        gdf = gdf.rename(columns={
            "县级代码": "county_code",
            "县级名称": "county_name",
            "行政代码": "county_code",
            "地名": "county_name",
            "adcode": "county_code",
            "ADCODE": "county_code",
        })

        if "county_code" not in gdf.columns:
            raise KeyError(
                f"Cannot find county_code field in boundary file: {geo_path}. "
                f"Available columns: {list(gdf.columns)}"
            )

        gdf["county_code"] = gdf["county_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))

        # 尽量转换到 WGS84 输出 lon/lat
        if gdf.crs is None:
            print("[WARN] boundary file CRS is None. Assuming it is already lon/lat (EPSG:4326).")
        else:
            try:
                if str(gdf.crs).lower() not in ["epsg:4326", "wgs84"]:
                    gdf = gdf.to_crs(epsg=4326)
            except Exception as e:
                print("[WARN] CRS transform failed; centroid may not be lon/lat. Error:", repr(e))

        # 计算几何中心点
        gdf["centroid"] = gdf.geometry.centroid
        gdf["county_lon"] = gdf["centroid"].x
        gdf["county_lat"] = gdf["centroid"].y

        # 输出标准列
        if "county_name" not in gdf.columns:
            gdf["county_name"] = np.nan

        coords = gdf[["county_code", "county_name", "county_lon", "county_lat"]].dropna().drop_duplicates()
        coords = coords[coords["county_code"].notna()].copy()
        return pd.DataFrame(coords)

    # ----------------------------------------------------------
    # Neither source exists -> clear guide
    # ----------------------------------------------------------
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "County coordinates missing.\n"
        "Provide ONE of the following:\n"
        f"  (1) CSV lookup: {PATHS['county_coord_csv']} (columns: 行政代码/地名/东经/北纬 OR county_code/county_lon/county_lat)\n"
        f"  (2) Boundary file to compute centroid: {PATHS['county_geojson']} OR {PATHS['county_shapefile']}\n"
        "Then re-run this chunk."
    )


# -----------------------------
# Load county coords
# -----------------------------
county_coords = load_county_coords(PATHS)

print("county_coords shape:", county_coords.shape)
print("county_coords sample:", county_coords.head(3).to_dict("records"))

# -----------------------------
# Merge coords into firm-year panels
# -----------------------------
merged_left_border["county_code"] = merged_left_border["county_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))
merged_inner_border["county_code"] = merged_inner_border["county_code"].map(lambda x: clean_admin_code(x, width=6))

merged_left_geo = merged_left_border.merge(
    county_coords[["county_code", "county_name", "county_lon", "county_lat"]],
    on="county_code",
    how="left",
)
merged_inner_geo = merged_inner_border.merge(
    county_coords[["county_code", "county_name", "county_lon", "county_lat"]],
    on="county_code",
    how="left",
)

print("\n[COORD merge] merged_left_geo shape:", merged_left_geo.shape)
print("[COORD merge] county_lon missing rate:", round(merged_left_geo["county_lon"].isna().mean(), 4))
print("[COORD merge] county_lat missing rate:", round(merged_left_geo["county_lat"].isna().mean(), 4))
```


# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 14) Final variable construction:
#          - other_pollutant selection
#          - so2_percap, so2_intensity
#          - size_quartile (within_year or overall)
# INPUTS : merged_left_geo, merged_inner_geo, CONFIG
# OUTPUTS: merged_left_final, merged_inner_final
# ============================================================
```{python}
def choose_other_pollutant(df: pd.DataFrame, priority):
    """
    Choose the first available pollutant column in priority list.
    If it exists but is nearly all missing, user should adjust priority manually.
    """
    for c in priority:
        if c in df.columns:
            missing_rate = df[c].isna().mean()
            print(f"[INFO] candidate other_pollutant={c} missing_rate={missing_rate:.4f}")
            return c
    return None

def add_size_quartile(df: pd.DataFrame, mode="within_year"):
    df = df.copy()
    # Employment must be positive for size
    emp = pd.to_numeric(df["employment"], errors="coerce")
    emp = emp.where(emp > 0, np.nan)

    if mode == "overall":
        # Global quartiles
        try:
            df["size_quartile"] = pd.qcut(emp, 4, labels=[1, 2, 3, 4], duplicates="drop")
        except Exception:
            df["size_quartile"] = np.nan
        return df

    # Within-year quartiles
    df["size_quartile"] = np.nan
    for y, g in df.groupby("year", dropna=True):
        e = pd.to_numeric(g["employment"], errors="coerce").where(pd.to_numeric(g["employment"], errors="coerce") > 0, np.nan)
        try:
            q = pd.qcut(e, 4, labels=[1, 2, 3, 4], duplicates="drop")
            df.loc[g.index, "size_quartile"] = q.astype("float")
        except Exception:
            df.loc[g.index, "size_quartile"] = np.nan
    return df

# Apply to both left and inner
merged_left_final = merged_left_geo.copy()
merged_inner_final = merged_inner_geo.copy()

# Select other pollutant
other_col = choose_other_pollutant(merged_left_final, CONFIG["other_pollutant_priority"])
if other_col is None:
    merged_left_final["other_pollutant"] = np.nan
    merged_left_final["other_pollutant_name"] = None
    merged_inner_final["other_pollutant"] = np.nan
    merged_inner_final["other_pollutant_name"] = None
else:
    merged_left_final["other_pollutant"] = merged_left_final[other_col]
    merged_left_final["other_pollutant_name"] = other_col
    merged_inner_final["other_pollutant"] = merged_inner_final[other_col]
    merged_inner_final["other_pollutant_name"] = other_col

# Derived variables: so2_percap and so2_intensity
merged_left_final["employment"] = pd.to_numeric(merged_left_final["employment"], errors="coerce")
merged_left_final["output"] = pd.to_numeric(merged_left_final["output"], errors="coerce")
merged_left_final["so2_emission"] = pd.to_numeric(merged_left_final["so2_emission"], errors="coerce")

# Per-capita: require employment > 0
merged_left_final["so2_percap"] = merged_left_final["so2_emission"] / merged_left_final["employment"].where(merged_left_final["employment"] > 0, np.nan)

# Intensity: require output > 0
merged_left_final["so2_intensity"] = merged_left_final["so2_emission"] / merged_left_final["output"].where(merged_left_final["output"] > 0, np.nan)

# Repeat for inner
merged_inner_final["employment"] = pd.to_numeric(merged_inner_final["employment"], errors="coerce")
merged_inner_final["output"] = pd.to_numeric(merged_inner_final["output"], errors="coerce")
merged_inner_final["so2_emission"] = pd.to_numeric(merged_inner_final["so2_emission"], errors="coerce")
merged_inner_final["so2_percap"] = merged_inner_final["so2_emission"] / merged_inner_final["employment"].where(merged_inner_final["employment"] > 0, np.nan)
merged_inner_final["so2_intensity"] = merged_inner_final["so2_emission"] / merged_inner_final["output"].where(merged_inner_final["output"] > 0, np.nan)

# Size quartile
merged_left_final = add_size_quartile(merged_left_final, mode=CONFIG["size_quartile_mode"])
merged_inner_final = add_size_quartile(merged_inner_final, mode=CONFIG["size_quartile_mode"])

print("\n[DERIVED] merged_left_final columns added: other_pollutant, so2_percap, so2_intensity, size_quartile")
```

```{python}
print("=== merged_left_final columns (original order) ===")
print(list(merged_left_final.columns))

print("\n=== merged_left_final columns (sorted) ===")
print(sorted(merged_left_final.columns))
```

# ============================================================
# PURPOSE: 15) Build final_big with required English fields + save to parquet
# INPUTS : merged_left_final, merged_inner_final, PATHS['final_parquet']
# OUTPUTS: final_big (from left version), final_big_inner (from inner version)
# ============================================================
```{python}
# Policy vars to keep (province_policy_vars)
policy_vars = [c for c in [
    "so2_2005_10kton", "so2_2010_actual_10kton", "so2_2010_planned_10kton",
    "so2_reduction_rate_11th_fyp", "so2_reduction_target_11th_fyp"
] if c in merged_left_final.columns]

# Final columns required by user (all English names)
final_cols = [
    "year",
    "firm_id",
    "county_code",
    "county_lon",
    "county_lat",
    "is_border_county",
    "city_code",
    "city_year_emission",
    "province",      # province name (Chinese value, English header)
    "prov_code",     # province code (two-digit)
] + policy_vars + [
    "so2_emission",
    "other_pollutant",
    "other_pollutant_name",
    "employment",
    "output",
    "profit",    quarto render "code/Final Project Part 1.qmd" --to pdf --output "/Users/xieziming/Xie-Le-DAP2-Final-Project/python2_Xie_Sun.pdf"
    "cic2",
    "type",
    "so2_percap",
    "so2_intensity",
    "size_quartile",
    "match_method",
    "_merge",
    "_merge_final",
]

final_cols = [c for c in final_cols if c in merged_left_final.columns]

final_big = merged_left_final[final_cols].copy()
final_big_inner = merged_inner_final[[c for c in final_cols if c in merged_inner_final.columns]].copy()

print("final_big shape (LEFT):", final_big.shape)
print("final_big_inner shape (INNER):", final_big_inner.shape)
print("final_big columns:", list(final_big.columns))

# ============================================================
# Export CSV
# ============================================================
from pathlib import Path

OUT_DIR = PATHS["out_dir"]
OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

csv_path = OUT_DIR / "final_big.csv"
csv_inner_path = OUT_DIR / "final_big_inner.csv"

final_big.to_csv(csv_path, index=False, encoding="utf-8-sig")
final_big_inner.to_csv(csv_inner_path, index=False, encoding="utf-8-sig")

print("Saved final_big CSV to:", csv_path)
print("Saved final_big_inner CSV to:", csv_inner_path)

# Preview
print("\nfinal_big head(10):")
print(final_big.head(10))
```
